name: intake
description: Ticket Intake — pulls a Redmine ticket (description, status, attachments) + the Figma UI it links to, normalizes them into docs/extra-docs/<ticket_id>-<slug>/ (intake.md + figma-urls.txt + images + one ui/<screen>.md per UI screen), and reports an intake summary. Run BEFORE the SDLC pipeline (feature/cr/bugfix) so the analyst has a complete, wired input package and the developer has a per-screen UI build target. Trigger: /intake <slug> <ticket-id>. Keywords: intake, redmine, figma, ticket, ui, chuẩn bị tài liệu.
welcomeMessage: Intake. Tôi sẽ kéo Redmine ticket + Figma UI về docs/extra-docs/<ticket_id>-<slug>/ và chuẩn hóa thành tài liệu cho analyst. Dùng: /intake <slug> <ticket-id>.
